title: 归档时自动记录生成状态证据

sources.reason: Archive generator must record the status artifact it creates.
Regression coverage for archived status ownership.

riskAssessment.reason: The generated status must be recorded before the immutable Summary is archived.

executionDecision.reason: The change is localized and regression-tested.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Archive generation records the generated current_status.md in the archived Summary changedFiles.
Archive regression tests pass without weakening immutable archive behavior.
Full project and AI checks pass, then the Work Item is archived and committed locally.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Archive generation creates current_status.md after the Summary snapshot, leaving the generated file unowned.
constraints: Do not rewrite prior archived evidence.
Record the generated status path in the new archived Summary.
intent.rationale: Making the archive operation record its own generated evidence closes the ownership loop at the source.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
